description: Exercises the fleeing (0.5x) / below-25% (0.25x) / fled (1x) VP multipliers together, custom objective_vp overrides for domination, and confirms strategic-locations is ignored when absent from secondary_objectives — strategicLocationVpTotal must be ignored despite being non-zero. common_objectives is empty, so a non-zero standardsCaptured must NOT contribute even though trophies-of-war would otherwise apply by default. Only 1 of 3 units actually left the table (fled), so Breaking the Enemy must not trigger.
